title: M.Y Texas Hold'em Poker & Blackjack Set - Includes Poker Chips Deck of Cards and Mat
features: ♠️ TWO IN ONE SET: The M.Y Poker Set helps to bring a little bit of Las Vegas magic to your home! Perfect for a competitive game with family or a high-stakes Friday night with friends!

♣️ SET INCLUDES: The M.Y Texas Hold 'em Poker Set includes everything you could need for your next Poker night; 200 Professional Poker Chips; 2 Laminated Playing Card Decks; Dealer, Big & Small Bling Buttons and a reversible felt playing mat.

♥️ The chips, in classic Casino colours, are un-numbered, perfect if you want to increase the stakes of a game and the Playing Cards have a premium laminated finish and make every hand feel like a Royal Flush!
♦️ This set can also be used for more than just poker! Perfect for a game of Black Jack or use the chips for game of roulette.
♠️ The M.Y Poker Set also comes with a high quality gift box, perfect for gifting or for storage
description: Product Description Texas Hold'em Poker & Blackjack 2-in-1 Poker Set Bring the feel of Vegas into your home with the deluxe 2-in-1 poker set. Neatly packed into a thick cardstock gift box with a silky matt finish, this poker set contains everything you need for your first poker night. The premium laminated playing cards and weighted chips make every hand feel like a winner. The 2-in-1 deluxe poker gift set contains 200 pieces. What are the different chips worth? The chips have been left intentionally blank so that you can decide your own values; whether you want to play for pennies, pounds or peanuts is up to you! How many chips are included in the set? The set includes 200 chips in a mix of classic casino colours: blue, green, white, and red. Are the blind chips included? Yes! Both big and small blind and dealer buttons are included What is the total weight of the poker set? The total weight of the 200 piece set is 1.38 KG M.Y Poker Sets 300 Piece Poker Set 500 Piece Poker Set 200 Piece Poker Set Size 39 x 20 x 6.5 cm Size 60 x 25 x 8 cm Size 27 x 19 x 6.5 cm Poker Chips 11.5g blank chips - 100 White, 50 Red, 50 Black, 50 Blue, 50 Green Poker Chips 11.5g blank chips - 150 White, 150 Red, 50 Black, 100 Blue, 50 Green Poker Chips 200 poker chips in red, blue, green, white and black Mat Included? N/A Mat Included? N/A Mat Included? One 90 x 60 cm double sided green felt texas hold'em and blackjack playing mat Total Weight 4.65 KG Total Weight 6.8 KG Total Weight 1.38 KG
